{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "findings": [
    "No drip pan installed where required by code and manufacturer instructions"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut off water heater and disconnect power/fuel supply",
    "Install a code-compliant drip pan with a proper drain line to an approved location",
    "Inspect surrounding structure for water damage and remediate as needed"
  ],
  "rationale": "A drip pan is required for water heaters installed in locations where leakage could cause damage (IPC 504.7, IRC P2801.6). Operating without one in such a location is a code violation and presents a high risk of uncontrolled water damage, mold, and potential structural issues.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 504.7",
    "IRC P2801.6"
  ],

  ],
